steps.t: The nearest inn is near the fountain in the centre of town. You might find Manna and Scurfa at the inn.
The innkeeper is behind the bar. The innkeeper may have information about the two former guards you are seeking.
The less-frequented inn is in lower Woodhurst. The innkeeper you spoke with suggested looking at a less-frequented -- and likely more dangerous -- inn…
Manna and Scurfa, the two former guards, are having drinks at a table in the shady inn in the lower section of Woodhurst. You should speak with Manna …
